summary: Iteration 82: Fixed critical HERE API integration bug and verified Route Comparison Panel features. The backend was returning 400 errors due to invalid HERE API parameters (fuelConsumption, vehicle[type], vehicle[fuelType]). Fixed by using correct fuel consumption parameters. All 10 requested features now working.

critical.issue: FIXED - HERE API was returning 400 due to invalid parameters: fuelConsumption in return, vehicle[type]=tractorTruck, vehicle[fuelType]=diesel
critical.fix_applied: Removed fuelConsumption from return, added fuel[type]=diesel with consumption tables, removed invalid vehicle[type] and vehicle[fuelType] parameters

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.ts line 462 - removed invalid 'fuelConsumption' from return parameter
FIXED: server.ts - added proper fuel[type]=diesel with fuel[freeFlowSpeedTable] and fuel[trafficSpeedTable] for diesel truck consumption
FIXED: server.ts - removed invalid vehicle[type] and vehicle[fuelType] parameters
VERIFIED: Route Comparison Panel shows 3 route cards with all required metrics
VERIFIED: Badges (FASTEST, CHEAPEST, SHORTEST) display correctly on primary route
VERIFIED: START NAV button has gold background (#D4AF37) and black text
VERIFIED: Color dots: gold for primary, blue for Alt 1, orange for Alt 2
VERIFIED: Fuel gallons and cost breakdown displayed (101.8 gal $358.17)
VERIFIED: Route selection highlights card with gold border
VERIFIED: Gold/black signature theme applied to panel

success_rate.backend: 100% - /api/route now working correctly with HERE API
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 10 Route Comparison Panel features verified

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: HERE API integration fixed. Route Comparison Panel fully functional with 3 route alternatives showing duration, distance, fuel gallons, fuel cost, total estimated cost, badges (FASTEST/CHEAPEST/SHORTEST/SAFEST), and cost savings. Backend uses fuel[type]=diesel with consumption tables for accurate fuel calculation. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

route_comparison_panel_loads.details: Panel appears at bottom when route calculated with 2+ alternatives

route_cards_metrics.details: Shows duration (9h 50m), distance (661.4 mi), fuel gallons (101.8 gal), fuel cost ($358.17), total estimated cost

smart_badges.details: FASTEST, CHEAPEST, SHORTEST badges displayed on primary route

start_nav_button.details: Gold background (rgb(212, 175, 55)), black text, visible and clickable

color_dots.details: Gold for primary, blue for Alt 1, orange for Alt 2

route_selection.details: Clicking route card highlights with gold border

gold_black_theme.details: Panel has black background with gold header text and borders

backend_route_api.details: Returns 400 on empty body, returns route data with fuel consumption on valid request

here_api_integration.details: Fixed invalid parameters, now using fuel[type]=diesel with consumption tables

bug_fix_details.root_cause: HERE Routing API v8 does not support 'fuelConsumption' as a return parameter, 'vehicle[type]', or 'vehicle[fuelType]'. These were added in the upgrade but are invalid.
bug_fix_details.fix: 1) Removed 'fuelConsumption' from return parameter. 2) Added fuel[type]=diesel with fuel[freeFlowSpeedTable] and fuel[trafficSpeedTable] for diesel truck consumption calculation. 3) Removed invalid vehicle[type] and vehicle[fuelType] parameters.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, Firebase, etc.)
